impact: This unblocks the next fail-closed lifecycle coverage validator task by making the committed public fixture carry the metadata that validator is expected to enforce, without changing validator code or adding live crawl behavior.
summary: Added fixture-only authorityLabel and recrawlCadence metadata to lifecycle source coverage evidence for extension, cancellation, refund, and inspection-result categories.
target_task: Task checkbox-13: Add fixture-only authority-label and recrawl-cadence metadata to the existing lifecycle source coverage report for extension, cancellation, refund, and inspection-result evidence only, preserving existing citations and avoiding validator code changes.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
